items.headline: Rox top prospect Holliday to have foot surgery, out for the season (source)

news_items.headline: Junk becomes latest Marlins pitcher to land on IL
news_items.summary: The Marlins' pitching staff took another hit Sunday, when Janson Junk was placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shin inflammation.

news_items.headline: Reds' De La Cruz exits with hamstring tightness
news_items.summary: Reds shortstop Elly De La Cruz left Sunday's game against the Atlanta Braves with right hamstring tightness after singling to right center in the fifth inning.

news_items.headline: A's get wrong end of ABS gaffe against Yankees
news_items.summary: The ABS system appeared to hit a rare glitch when a pitch to A's left fielder Tyler Soderstrom was confirmed as a strike even though the replay showed it missed the zone by a little less than an inch.

news_items.headline: Pirates put righty Mlodzinski on restricted list
news_items.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates put Carmen Mlodzinski on the restricted list Sunday, saying the right-hander was not ready to pitch this weekend.

news_items.headline: ChiSox 1B Murakami (hamstring) out 4-6 weeks
news_items.summary: White Sox slugger Munetaka Murakami is expected to miss four to six weeks with a Grade 2 right hamstring strain, manager Will Venable announced Saturday.

news_items.headline: Twins put right-hander Ober (elbow) on 15-day IL
news_items.summary: The Minnesota Twins put right-hander Bailey Ober on the 15-day injured list with right elbow inflammation. Ober is 6-3 with a 4.59 ERA in 66⅔ innings this season.

news_items.headline: A's Severino goes on IL with right shoulder strain...
news_items.summary: The Athletics have placed starter Luis Severino on the 15-day injured list with a strained right shoulder after he left his previous start after one inning.

news_items.headline: Twins designate Woods Richardson for assignment
news_items.summary: The Twins have designated struggling starting pitcher Simeon Woods Richardson for assignment and recalled rookie John Klein.

news_items.headline: The Viva El Birdos Podcast – Episode 67: “Blogger Day” 2026 with Chaim Bloom
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals hold an annual event for “non-traditional” media types who cover the team, including yours truly, where we have the opportunity to have access to whoever the current sitting POBO of the team is. Historically, that’s been John Mozeliak, but this year we had our first opportunity to ask Chaim Bloom about […]

news_items.headline: Dodgers vs. Phillies game III chat
news_items.summary: Yoshinobu Yamamoto faces Andrew Painter as the Dodgers look to take two of three against the Philadelphia Phillies. SUNDAY GAME INFO

news_items.headline: Jose Siri robs grand slam, saves Rays' buffet
news_items.summary: Former Ray Jose Siri reached over the short left field fence at Tropicana Field on Sunday, continuing the Angels outfield acrobatics.

news_items.headline: For Cal Raleigh, injury presents a new perspective on the Mariners
news_items.summary: While Cal Raleigh isn’t happy about his first-ever stint on the IL, he’s attempting to make the most of it

news_items.headline: New York Yankees @ The Athletics: Will Warren vs. Jacob Lopez
news_items.summary: Can the Yankees close the month with a win?

news_items.headline: Elly leaves Sunday's game vs. Braves with right hamstring tightness
Reds star Elly De La Cruz leaves game vs. Braves early with hamstring injury
news_items.summary: Elly De La Cruz pulled up awkwardly while rounding first base on Sunday afternoon, and was quickly pulled from the game.

news_items.headline: HR robbery saves a grand slam and an entire buffet
Just A Terrible Game, Jays Lose To Orioles
news_items.summary: Orioles 9 Blue Jays 5 That was bad in so many ways. Worst of which, Jesús Sánchez was hit in the wrist by a ball thrown from the stands. They are saying he has a contusion, which is pretty much the best possible news. It was weird. Apparently, a kid(?) or young person, thought that […]
